Technology.topic: Resolved: strict device attestation improves consumer security more than it harms repairability and privacy.
Should open-weight large language models be treated as dual-use infrastructure subject to export controls?
Is the end of Moore's law a bigger threat to AI progress than data scarcity?

AI Ethics.topic: Should companies be legally required to disclose when a customer is speaking with an autonomous AI agent?
Is it ethical to train frontier models on publicly posted personal content without explicit opt-in?
Do AI safety evaluations belong primarily inside labs, or should third-party auditors hold binding veto power?

Education.topic: Will AI tutors widen educational inequality faster than they close achievement gaps?
Should essay assignments be redesigned around in-class synthesis now that generative AI exists?
Is personalized AI curriculum a net positive for critical thinking skills?

Healthcare.topic: Should diagnostic AI systems require physician co-signature before influencing treatment plans?
Is predictive risk scoring in public health surveillance justified when models inherit historical bias?
Will ambient clinical documentation AI reduce burnout more than it erodes bedside rapport?

Politics.topic: Should micro-targeted political advertising powered by AI be banned outright?
Are deepfake disclosure laws sufficient, or do we need platform-level provenance infrastructure?
Is ranked-choice voting more compatible with AI-generated voter education than first-past-the-post?

Future of Work.topic: Is a four-day work week more realistic if AI automates middle-skill knowledge tasks?
Should firms compensate workers whose outputs are used to fine-tune internal AI models?
Will AI coding assistants concentrate power in senior engineers or democratize software creation?

Society.topic: Do algorithmic feeds improve cultural discovery or flatten pluralism into engagement-optimized monoculture?
Should cities regulate autonomous delivery robots on sidewalks before scaling nationwide?
Is universal basic income a credible response to AI-driven labor displacement within a decade?

trending.topic: Should frontier AI labs pause scaling until interpretability catches up with capability?
Is on-device AI the right default for consumer assistants to protect sensitive context?
Will AI-generated research summaries harm scientific literacy more than they accelerate discovery?

popular.topic: Which matters more for trustworthy AI: better benchmarks or adversarial red-teaming at deployment scale?
Should social platforms label synthetic media even when it is satire or art?
Is remote work sustainable when AI managers can monitor productivity in fine-grained detail?

controversial.topic: Should nations treat autonomous lethal weapons as inevitable and regulate them, or pursue a binding ban?
Is it acceptable to use patient records from wealthy countries to train models deployed globally?
Should AI systems be granted legal personhood for liability purposes once they act autonomously in markets?
